title: nf-vcf-cataloguer
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b018u","text":"'nf-vcf-cataloguer' is a tool, implemented in Nextflow, that generates a general table description in TSV format of the description of each category and subgroup of a VCF with the extended annotation made by VEP. Furthermore, it plots each subset of the consequences of variants.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Custom filter Remove the variants that have the AN (total number of alleles in called genotypes) value assigned. a) Includes sites where the compressed VCF file '.vcf.gz' comply with the AN value. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9
Separate SNVs and indels Keep only certain types of variants. a) Includes SNPs of a compressed VCF file '.vcf.gz'. b) Includes indels of a compressed VCF file '.vcf.gz'. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9

Separate rare, low and common frequencies Keep only certain types of variants, set by its allele frequency. a) Separate variants by its allele frequency category. b) Separate variants in common frequency. c) Separate variants in low frequency. d) Separate variants in rare frequency. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9
Separate selection signals Keep only variants with selection signals. a) Separate variants on selection, with a reference ID list of selection signals. b) Sort output file. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9

Separate low EAS and low EUR variants a) Filter variants with more than 5% of allele frequency in the local population. b) Filter variants with less than 5% of allele frequency in EAS and NFE gnomAD population. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97

Separate common AMR and low EUR variants Separate variants by its allele frequency comparing other populations of the gnomAD database. a) Filter variants with more than 5% of allele frequency in local population. b) Filter variants with more than 5% of allele frequency in AMR gnomAD population. c) Filter variants with less than 5% of allele frequency in NFE gnomAD population. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get CLINVAR and OMIM variants Separate variants annotated by the ClinVar database. a) Separate variants annotated by ClinVar. b) Extract OMIM variants. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get GenHancer variants Separate variants with a GeneHancer ID. a) Filter variants that match with annotations in the "GeneHancer type and genes" field. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get GWASCatalog variants Separate variants with a GeneHancer ID. a) Filter variants that match with annotations in "gwascatalog" field. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get miRNAs variants Separate variants with miRNA data. a) Filter variants that match with annotations in "miRBase" field. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97

Get novel and known variants Separate known and unknown variants. a) Filters variants that have a rsID and are reported by dbSNP. b) Separate unknown variants (without rsID in dbSNP). Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get coding variants Separate variants in coding regions. a) Separate exonic variants. b) Filter intronic variants. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get PGKB variants Separate variants found in PGKB database. a) Filter variants that match with annotations in "PGKB" field. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97
Get UTR variants Separate variants found in 5' or 3' UTR regions. a) Filter variants that are in 5' UTR. b) Filter variants that are in 3' UTR. Dependencies: filter_vep 96 & 97

VCF to TSV Convert vcf files to tsv format. a) Search ANN header and separates it by tabs. b) Separate columns by tabs. c) Add a "." to blank spaces. Dependencies: bcftools 1.9 Final Output: A '.tsv.gz' file with columns of the VEP annotations, by each vcf converted. Count variants Count variants by using "summary_cleaner.R" tool. Summary_cleaner.R is a tool for counting variants from different types and subgroups. Dependencies: summary_cleaner.R Final Output: A '.tsv' the description of the counted variants by each subgroup of variants. Example line(s): row_namcommon_freqcommonAMR_lowEURlow_freqlowEAS_lowEURNo_filterrare_freqselection_signals miRNA0000000 PGKB0000000 GWAScatalog3000300 OMIM6210920 coding_region701119110 clinvar162202130 utr905267161450 dbSNPnovel35211439778280 GeneHancer599441874710332470 dbSNPknown899574627065671458628850 general (all indels)903074828205701556337130
QC VEP consequence plot Plot consequences of each category of variants. Dependencies: plotter.R
